name: Faux Leather Futon Sofa with Arms Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Make moments shared with friends and family more precious with this Black Faux-Leather Futon Sofa with Arms from Room Essentials™. Upholstered in a black faux-leather fabric, this sleek contemporary sofa has arms for comfortable support and easily converts into a bed with its click-clack technology so you can accommodate overnight guests. With this stylish and functional futon sofa, you'll love sitting, relaxing and chatting for longer in your updated living space.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.
